message.content:
@startuml
actor "Team Member" as TeamMember
participant ":CreateTaskUI" as CreateTaskUI
participant ":CreateTaskController" as CreateTaskController
database :DataManagement as DataManagement
entity projectStore <<Project>> { } 
object Project1<<project>>{ } 

== Task Creation ==

activate TeamMember #DDDF00;line:#7D68A9;text:black;


create participant "#32CD32;background:green;font:white;"as P#54 \n ##Part 5##\n\n=====\n__The part of the sequence __ which is added for creating **the task** itself.\nThe ref to 'task creation' can be seen in [[https://plantuml.com/sequence-diagram this]] example. Note that some <font color=red>colors</font>, like red/blue/green are available without any '<color>' tags! See also the reference on [[http://www.planttext.com/api/plantuml.jsp?showSyntax=true syntax]]. 


P#5 -> P#5++ : This should appear after Part-4, but before `ref` box...



note over P#5,P#5+
 The note shows up between parts  
 even though they're not connected directly..
end note




deactivate team member   // Deactivates all active participants automatically upon reaching end-of-file or next activation/deactivation command respectively if specified explicitly otherwise implicitly assumed at EOF unless overridden by user preference settings etcetera ... so we don't need explicit deact here anymore since there won’t another act later anyway due file termination coming soon enough now right ? :)  

@enduml
